results.content: ## Indian stocks closed sharply lower on Wednesday, tracking overnight losses for software companies in Wall Street. Infosys lost 2% and Tech Mahindra dropped 1.2%, aligned with the pullback in the US AI software sector due to unease of higher borrowing costs and worries that elevated infrastructure spending may not bring the expected returns.
